title: Switch Strategy
strategy_desc: Choose how providers are automatically switched
strategy_priority_desc: Select providers by priority order (lower number = higher priority)
strategy_fastest_desc: Automatically select the provider with the shortest response time
strategy_cost_desc: Select the provider with the lowest per-token cost
strategy_load_balance_desc: Round-robin across all available providers, distributing requests evenly
strategy_smart_desc: Four-dimensional weighted scoring: health, speed, cost, and priority
advanced_desc: Adjust retry count and smart strategy weights
max_retries_hint: Number of automatic retries with next provider on failure (0 = no retry)
